title: BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited!
